SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BENDICK, MARK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSS, ADAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENDICK, MARK $2,695.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,870.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ROSS, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT BENDICK, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
